issues.detail: The skill file does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases comprehensively.

scenarios.name: Build a Stripe refund admin panel with a confirmation flow
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses {{ table1.selectedRow.stripe_charge_id }} bindings, utils.openConfirmDialog, refundQuery.trigger(), utils.showNotification, and re-runs usersQuery as documented; baseline writes a generic React + Express refund flow.

scenarios.name: Trial-expiration reminder workflow
scenarios.rationale: Treatment builds a Retool Workflow with scheduled trigger, query() for expiring trials, per-row sendgrid.send with template_id, and log-insert step from the skill; baseline writes a standalone cron + Node script.
